hidReceive.comment: Initiating command ID with top bit set (0x80xx)

payload.comment:
Bright : 0x00~0x64

Effect :
0x00 : 0ff
0x01 : Static
0x02 : Wave_Rainbow_Left
0x03 : Wave_Rainbow_Right
0x04 : Wave_Sunset_Left
0x05 : Wave_Sunset_Right
0x06 : Wave_Aurora_Left
0x07 : Wave_Aurora_Right
0x08 : Wave_Electro_Left
0x09 : Wave_Electro_Right
0x0a : Wave_Lemon_Left
0x0b : Wave_Lemon_Right
0x0c : Cycle_Rainbow
0x0d : Cycle_Sunset
0x0e : Cycle_Aurora
0x0f : Cycle_Electro
0x10 : Cycle_Lemon
0x11 : Rain Drop(Solid)
0x12 : Rain Drop(Random)
0x13 : Breathing(Solid)
0x14 : Breathing(Random)

Speed : 0x00~0x64

Color: 0x00~0Xff (Color R)

payload.comment:
Bright : 0x00~0x64

Effect :
0x00 : 0ff
0x01 : Ripple(Solid)
0x02 : Ripple(Random)
0x03 : Reactive(Solid)
0x04 : Reactive(Random)

Width:

0x01 : 3 key (Normal)
0x02 : 4 key (Thick)

commands.name: Set Rapid Trigger Press Value ref 0x0108
Get Rapid Trigger Press Value ref 0x0108
Set Rapid Trigger Release Value ref 0x0108
Get Rapid Trigger Release Value ref 0x0108
Get All Rapid Trigger Release Value

ack.comment: 6 bytes per step: [DelayType(0=Fixed,1=Random), DelayMS_L, DelayMS_H, Action(0=None,1=Press,2=Release), KC_L, KC_H]

payload.comment:
0x01: count= 1 step
0x02: count= 2 step
0x03: count= 3 step
0x04: count= 4 step

0x00: Delay Type = Fixed
0x01: Delay Type = Random
DelayMS  byte (LE uint16, 0.65535 ms, after action)

0x00: Action = None
0x01: Action = Press
0x02:  Action = Release
Repeated offsets 2-8 are valid when count > 1
